narrative:
Ohio Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 423 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.8 percentage points.
